channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overhanging/protruding vegetation, 18th June
item.description:
On the shared path/bridleway between Bury Green Rd., St. Mary's High School and the New River Path: lots of overgrown vegetation and overhanging branches, growing at a rapid pace. Please could the relevant works be arranged to keep the path safe and accessible with a clear sightline. It would be greatly appriciated. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 176, Bury Green Road, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation, 18th June
item.description:
The vegetation is growing rapidly and narrowing the usable width of the shared path, minimising the sight line. This is the case for the whole stretch of the path, some areas worse than others. Please could the relevant works be arranged to keep this pathway accessible and safe. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lieutenant Ellis Way, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti vandalism, 18th June
item.description:
Graffiti vandalism on the electrical substation enclosure. Please could this be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Windmill Lane, Cheshunt, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rutting on hertford toad stop G edmonto n green, 18th June
item.description:
Rutting causing cars to clip and buses bounce

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Access Road From The Green To Edmonton Green Bus Station, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown bushes obstructing path - cannot pass in wheelchair, 18th June
item.description:
Overgrown bushes and trees on corner of Arbuthnot lane/ Gresham close and outside 1 Gresham Close. I had reported and case was closed but nothing had changed. You can not safely walk on pavement and unable to pass in a wherlchair
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Arbuthnot Lane, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti vandalism, 18th June
item.description:
Graffiti covering the kick plates on green vertical-bar pedestrian safety fence on the footbridge walkway. Vandalism is on both fences bordering the walkway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lieutenant Ellis Way, Cheshunt, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop X seating loose, 18th June
item.description:
Seat has come loose from its base

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Circular Road, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees conceal traffic light, 18th June
item.description:
The trees on the pavement conceal a clear view of traffic lights making the crossing easier to miss
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 279-285, Clapham Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van appears abandoned, 18th June
item.description:
This van whose number plate is lying on the other side of the road looks like it has been abandoned It hasn't moved in weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Byne Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nettles, 18th June
item.description:
The grass verge never fully gets cut and i'm sick of getting stung by nettles getting in and out of the car and also up the verge by the path. these pics were taken this morning where they seem to do half a job done before 9am hence why cars are still there. Maybe you need to put up a notice of intent to cut so people can move there cars? Last time the grass was cut this area was not done at all. Outside no 71 there is also a bin that's not been emptied for 3 weeks and people are adding to it so its overflowing and also now there are dumped/ripped rubbish bags next to it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposters on every exit of Frognal Corner Roundabout, 18th June
item.description:
Flyposters on every exit and leading down the slip road towards B&Q. Please ask your contractors to check carefully so that they remove all of them as I can't report each one individually. I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///living.lively.flight https://w3w.co/living.lively.flight

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frognal Corner, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needs clearing up..., 18th June
item.description:
G

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandford Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking. Gutters and bushes push fence down, 18th June
item.description:
The land be sides 216 Ellenborough road is the north cray community centre which is owned by bexley council not L&Q Has not been maintained for sometime and has destroyed the fencing and I have to keep getting my grandchildren to go up ladder to clear gutters

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thursland Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Dumped item by 177 Amhurst Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Car has not moved in years, 18th June
item.description:
Used as storage?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Silvester Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Linsey street se16 3ue, 18th June
item.description:
Grass cutting team have not locked the estate gate near the two shops in linsey street.drove off without locking the gate again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Excessive rubbish and fly tipping, 18th June
item.description:
The rubbish area opposite fields estate on Middleton road is overflowing. Health and safety issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Guinness Advert Flyposter on fence in Thornet Wood Road, 18th June
item.description:
Guinness Advert Flyposter on fence in Thornet Wood Road. I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///rounds.onion.combining https://w3w.co/rounds.onion.combining

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornet Wood Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Great russell st opposite bury place, 18th June
item.description:
I was walking along, and didn't realise the man hole was cracked in two and I have stepped on it, to which my leg went through and I fell over. My leg and knee is very bruised and sore. It's very dangerous and a busy street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Great Russell Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
